sections.paragraph:
verb לצלות

to roast, barbecue, grill, broil

verb להיצלות

be roasted, grilled, barbecued, broiled

verb להצל

to shade, cast a shadow

verb להציל

to save, rescue; salvage (sea)

verb הוצל

be saved, rescued; salvaged (ship at sea)

verb הוצל

be shadowed

masculine noun

shadow, shade, shelter, cloud, ghost

masculine noun

negative aspects
